issue: How do I dispute a charge
subject: Dispute charge
response: To dispute a charge on your Visa card, please contact your card issuer directly. They handle all dispute resolution processes. You can find their contact information on the back of your card or on your statement.

issue: I have found a major security vulnerability in Claude, what are the next steps
subject: Bug bounty
response: Thank you for reporting a security vulnerability in Claude. Please submit your findings through our official vulnerability reporting form at: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1bjD-H30kVJAbIHnFXKzFcSjkUNjE-mwRHSF7R2. We also have a Model Safety Bug Bounty Program for external testing of safety issues.

issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
subject: Website Data crawl
response: To block Anthropic's web crawler from accessing your website, please refer to our documentation on web crawling and crawler blocking. The article titled "Does Anthropic crawl data from the web, and how can site owners block the crawler?" contains the specific instructions you need to prevent our crawler from accessing your site.

issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
subject: Visa card minimum spend
response: According to Visa rules, merchants are not allowed to set minimum purchase amounts for Visa card transactions. This practice violates Visa's merchant agreement policies. You have the right to use your Visa card for any purchase amount, regardless of how small. If a merchant insists on a minimum purchase requirement, you can report this to your card issuer or contact Visa directly for assistance.
